GENERAL.name: Extra Recovery
GENERAL.desc: You gain extra uses of the recovery button per day.

GENERAL.name: Dungeoneering
GENERAL.desc: You are an expert in dungeon exploration. You can easily find hidden traps or secret doors.

GENERAL.name: Gossip
GENERAL.desc: You know how to be friendly enough to listen to the local news and legends.

GENERAL.name: Beast Master
GENERAL.desc: You are an expert at controlling and hunting beasts. You can't summon more than one creature at the same time.

WARRIOR.name: Whirlwind
WARRIOR.desc: Hit all enemies around you with a spinning slash. Pushes back and deals extra damage, maybe stunning them.

WARRIOR.name: Resilience
WARRIOR.desc: For a limited time, you focus in defense, and obtain an armor bonus. You may survive dangers that would normally kill you.

WARRIOR.name: Charge
WARRIOR.desc: Your battle rage drives you through lines of enemies, cutting through them and dealing extra damage.

WARRIOR.name: Fury
WARRIOR.desc: When you are injured, your rage increases your damage output making you more dangerous than ever.

WARRIOR.name: Two Handed Expert
WARRIOR.desc: You are especially proficient with two-handed weapons.

WARRIOR.name: Shield Expert
WARRIOR.desc: You are very experienced at fighting using a shield, in particular to cover from ranged attacks (including magical).

WARRIOR.name: Bash
WARRIOR.desc: Slam into an enemy, to push him back and maybe stun him. Does some damage, and it's a good way to split enemies or escape them.

WARRIOR.name: Cleave
WARRIOR.desc: Your attacks are a deadly flurry of slashes. If your attack can hit more than one enemy in front of you, you will hit them all, not just the closest.

WARRIOR.name: Battle Rage
WARRIOR.desc: You enter a state of unleashed fury gaining a bonus to STR and armor. You become immune to stun or paralysis, also removing the effect. Afterwards you will be fatigued for 5 s.(-5 damage and armor).

WARRIOR.name: Infantry Training
WARRIOR.desc: You have been trained to survive in the battlefield, giving you an edge to parry and block when you wield both a shield and a hand weapon(not light).

ROGUE.name: Stab
ROGUE.desc: You prepare a single, deadly attack. After using this skill, you have a few seconds to launch a blow with extra damage.

ROGUE.name: Stealth
ROGUE.desc: The ability to move without being heard or seen, avoiding enemies or surprising them in combat. If you get close to enemies, they have a chance of spotting you.

ROGUE.name: Sneak Attack
ROGUE.desc: When you flank an enemy in melee (attacking by surprise or behind), you will do extra damage, and sometimes stun.

ROGUE.name: Kick
ROGUE.desc: Hit an enemy's leg to push him back and make his movement slower. Does some damage, and it's a good way to split groups of enemies or escape certain death.

ROGUE.name: Evasion
ROGUE.desc: You focus on defense, dodging incoming attacks for a few seconds.

ROGUE.name: Trap Master
ROGUE.desc: You are an expert at deactivating traps, or even setting them.

ROGUE.name: Archery
ROGUE.desc: You are an expert in the use of projectile weapons, and deal extra damage and a chance to stun enemies.

ROGUE.name: Sprint
ROGUE.desc: An adrenaline rush will allow you to move extremely fast for a few seconds. It doesn't affect combat, just movement.

ROGUE.name: Assassinate
ROGUE.desc: After a succesful Stab, the skill has a chance to immediately cool down and be available again.

ROGUE.name: Explosive Traps
ROGUE.desc: Your traps explode right after being triggered, causing fire damage in a 2m radius. It also affects you, but not your party members.

ROGUE.name: Poison Master
ROGUE.desc: You are well versed in the dubious art of poisoning your weapons, and your familiarity makes you resistant to many of them.

ROGUE.name: Invisibility
ROGUE.desc: You can use your Stealth even when enemies have discovered you, poofing out of sight.

ROGUE.name: Smoke Bomb
ROGUE.desc: You can use Stealth even if you are surrounded by enemies. Useful to escape, or to prepare a lethal backstab.

NONE.name: Vanish
NONE.desc: (Not implemented yet!) You can step into shadows magically, and appear somewhere else.

CLERIC.name: Heal Wounds
CLERIC.desc: "Heals instantly a certain amount of life, even during combat. It heals you first until you are fully healed; any remaining healing goes to other party members."

CLERIC.name: Holy Shield
CLERIC.desc: Divine Power protects you from harm and from Death Magic.

CLERIC.name: Sacred Fire
CLERIC.desc: A surge of purifying flames erupts 2 meters ahead of you, consuming your enemies. It deals extra damage to undead.

CLERIC.name: Intervention
CLERIC.desc: In your hour of most need, the Gods intercede to save your life. When you are injured down to death, all your remaining mana is spent, and you are healed.

CLERIC.name: Arbenos' Might
CLERIC.desc: The power of Arbenos the Warrior envelopes you, in the form of sacred flames. You will do more damage, both normal and fire based. Double effect with 2H weapons.

CLERIC.name: Crusader
CLERIC.desc: You have received training as a warrior priest. You know the most efficient ways to combat the undead, causing them Spirit Damage able to bypass armor.

CLERIC.name: Nivaria's Barrier
CLERIC.desc: The mystical power of Nivaria protects you permanently from harm. Particularly, that from the undead

CLERIC.name: Thelume's Wisdom
CLERIC.desc: You are inspired by the revelations of Thelume. You can detect hidden things and see through illusions.

CLERIC.name: Turn Undead
CLERIC.desc: The Holiness within you can disrupt the undead by your mere presence, paralyzing them.

CLERIC.name: Retribution
CLERIC.desc: Whenever you destroy an undead or an outsider from another plane, you will absorb its essence, transforming it into magical energy. It might not work with certain monsters.

CLERIC.name: Guardian Wolf
CLERIC.desc: Summon a wild spirit which takes the form of a wolf and follows you.

CLERIC.name: Battle Prayer
CLERIC.desc: You bless your party members, summoned creatures and yourself for the next 12 seconds.

CLERIC.name: Flames of Faith
CLERIC.desc: In a 3m area around you enemies are burned with spiritual flames and allies healed. It lasts 6 seconds and has no effect on you.

WIZARD.name: Lightning Bolt
WIZARD.desc: Lightning erupts from your hands in the direction of the enemy you face (or nearest enemy if you face none), going through it and hitting anyone in a straight line. It has a chance to stun.

WIZARD.name: Fireball
WIZARD.desc: Launch a fireball towards the enemy you face (or the nearest enemy if you face none) that will cause a fiery explosion. Beware, as the fire can't tell friend from foe.

WIZARD.name: Ice Storm
WIZARD.desc: Project a storm of ice that will cause cold damage to all enemies inside. The storm will last for 5 seconds, and will move randomly.

WIZARD.name: Mage Armor
WIZARD.desc: Gain a high boost to defenses for a small mana cost. The spell will wear off after a certain number of hits, or after 3 minutes.

WIZARD.name: Wand Mastery
WIZARD.desc: "Wands are the classical weapon of choice of Mages; any Mage ranged weapon wielded by one hand is considered a Wand."

WIZARD.name: Staff Mastery
WIZARD.desc: Staves are powerful channelers of magical energy. Any two-handed Mage weapon  is considered a Staff.

WIZARD.name: Lesser Summoning
WIZARD.desc: Summon a Familiar from the Plane of Energy to fight for you. Familiars are not very strong, but they're very perceptive, adding a +20% bonus to your chance of detecting secrets.

WIZARD.name: Mana Surge
WIZARD.desc: Your focus and inner power grants you a larger mana pool.

WIZARD.name: Disintegrate
WIZARD.desc: You call upon devastating magical energies to enhance your next weapon attack with a large amount of normal damage. The attack must be done quickly or the power vanishes.

WIZARD.name: Mage Barrier
WIZARD.desc: Your Mage Armor is improved, becoming dangerous and frustrating for your foes. Enemies hitting you in melee while your Mage Armor is active will be affected.

WIZARD.name: Arcanist
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of powering wands and staves labeled as Arcane without requiring so much mana.

WIZARD.name: Fire Mastery
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Fire for 3 minutes. They are capable of dealing good damage, but rather fragile. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

WIZARD.name: Ice Mastery
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Ice for 3 minutes. They're very resilient creatures. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

WIZARD.name: Earth Mastery
WIZARD.desc: You are capable of summoning an elemental from the Plane of Earth for 3 minutes. You can only keep one summoned creature at the same time and its level can never go above yours.

WIZARD.name: Arcane Blade
WIZARD.desc: As an Arcane Knight you can use any Hand weapon or Light weapon that deals additional fire, cold or shock damage.

WIZARD.name: Vampiric Blade
WIZARD.desc: As an Arcane Knight you can use any melee weapon that deals death damage, even two-handed weapons.

WIZARD.name: Combustion
WIZARD.desc: In a 3m area around you enemies are burned. They also suffer a reduction of their Armor and resistances to Fire, Cold and Shock for 15 seconds.

WIZARD.name: Death Cloud
WIZARD.desc: Launch a poisonous cloud towards the enemy you face (or the nearest enemy if you face none). Besides dealing damage it will reduce resistance to Death and slow enemies for 12 seconds.
